FAQ

Before you ask

How many people fit inside?

Up to 16 guests in the wraparound lounge. Tell us your group size and we'll confirm comfort for the route.

Can the route leave Prague?

Yes — the Bohemian Day route runs out toward Karlstejn and the vineyard roads beyond it.

Can we bring our own drinks?

The on-board mini-bar is yours for the ride. Bring what you like, we'll keep it cold.

How far ahead should we book?

Weekends and stag/hen season fill fast — 2–3 weeks out is safest.

Booking request

Tell us the date. We'll route the night.

This is a request, not a charge — we confirm availability and price before anything is locked in.
SEND BOOKING REQUEST
